content:
If the submitted form has already won the first prize, it will not be selected as the first prize again next time

If you submit multiple works in one track, we will only select the best one for evaluation<:H_immerse:1426122347643146250>

is first top guides or does that also include featured? I've made a new submission now anyway but just curious still if i could submit my first work again later as it is a lot of work updating it. (Also wish I just submitted my first work here because I'd rather win this frame if I did place well 😭 )
With this one trick you can gain 1 more view on all your videos <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149>

I'm very sorry, I would like to apply to announce the list of winners next week. Currently, we have only selected half of the works<:Meow:1400771520757891123> 
Sorry again🙏
